title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 281.015 - Director of agriculture to administer
text:
281.015.  Director of agriculture to administer. — Sections 281.005 to 281.115 shall be administered by the director of the department of agriculture of the state of Missouri.
(L. 1974 S.B. 431 § 2, A.L. 1992 H.B. 1764, A.L. 2021 H.B. 476 merged with S.B. 26) 
Effective 1-01-25, see § 281.102
